allow: Bash(shellcheck reforge.sh install.sh commands/*.sh lib/*.sh analyzers/*.sh appliers/*.sh)
Bash(shellcheck -x -e SC2034 reforge.sh install.sh commands/*.sh lib/*.sh analyzers/*.sh appliers/*.sh)
Bash(shellcheck -x -e SC2034 -e SC1091 reforge.sh install.sh commands/*.sh lib/*.sh analyzers/*.sh appliers/*.sh)
Bash(shellcheck -x -e SC2034 -e SC1091 -S warning reforge.sh install.sh commands/*.sh lib/*.sh analyzers/*.sh appliers/*.sh)
